message:
fix(codegen): Remove double toBool wrapper for boolop conditions

Boolop expressions (and/or) are already wrapped with runtime.toBool()
by logical.zig. The if-statement handler was adding another wrapper
for unknown types, causing double toBool() which prevented __bool__
methods from being properly invoked on class instances.

Before: if (runtime.toBool(runtime.toBool(try runtime.pyOr(...))))
After:  if (runtime.toBool(try runtime.pyOr(...)))

Added is_boolop check to skip wrapper for boolop conditions.
Also includes walrus operator variable name fixes and conditional
depth tracking improvements.
